Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/effectDoNotation_preview.ts(8,3): warning TS377085: This uses the Effect do emulation. `Effect.gen` or `Effect.fn` achieve the same result with native JS scopes. effect(effectDoNotation)


==== /.src/effectDoNotation_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics effectDoNotation:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    import { pipe } from "effect/Function"
    
    export const preview = pipe(
      Effect.Do,
      ~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377085: This uses the Effect do emulation. `Effect.gen` or `Effect.fn` achieve the same result with native JS scopes. effect(effectDoNotation)
      Effect.bind("a", () => Effect.succeed(1)),
      Effect.let("b", ({ a }) => a + 1),
      Effect.bind("c", ({ b }) => Effect.succeed(b.toString()))
    )
